problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
